name: SOUTH DAKOTA SOYBEAN PROCESSORS LLC
summary: South Dakota Soybean Processors LLC (SDSP) is an agricultural processing company that processes soybeans into soybean meal and soybean oil. The company operates as a limited liability company and files with the SEC under ticker SDSYA. Based on the filing structure, SDSP is engaged in soybean processing operations, producing commodity agricultural products for sale in relevant markets.
